subcodes.first_line: O people of God! At this hour the Supreme Pen turneth unto you from the Prison of 'Akká [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حزب الله در این حین قلم اعلی از سجن عکا بشما توجه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
